title: CamoWarfare
description: Modular camouflage hull blocks and armor attachments for Minecraft vehicle builders.
body:
CamoWarfare expands the block palette for military and vehicle-focused builds with camouflage coating blocks, armor plates, slat armor, and hanging vehicle plates.

It includes multiple terrain-themed camouflage families for woodland, mountain, desert, snow, night, naval, and urban builds, plus organized creative-tab sections so builders can quickly find the pieces they need.
